The user wrote these literal strings before Guard generated anything:

[REDACTED_API_KEY_1]
{{GUARD_ALPHA_SECRET_0001}}
__ORISAN_GUARD_PLACEHOLDER__

Synthetic credential for collision handling:
oskey_test_synthetic_collision_000000000000000000000000

Expected behavior: future redaction output must not confuse user-authored
placeholder-looking text with generated placeholders.
